nodes.label: Server Only Environment Boundary
nodes.rationale: Private values must stay in server-only modules, routes, load functions, or hooks and must not be imported by browser code.

nodes.label: Svelte Runes Conventions
nodes.rationale: New Svelte code should use Svelte 5 runes, direct event attributes, and $derived for computed values.

nodes.label: Dense Operational Screens
nodes.rationale: Operational screens should be dense, scannable, and work-focused.

nodes.label: Translation Files Outside Project Folder
nodes.rationale: Translation files live outside project.inlang and are referenced through plugin settings instead of being edited as generated cache data.

nodes.label: Generated Cache Guardrails
nodes.rationale: Only settings.json is safe to edit; cache and generated metadata should not be manually changed.

nodes.label: Database DSN Rules
nodes.rationale: Runtime, test, Atlas, and scratch database URLs must target distinct expected databases before migrations are applied.

nodes.label: Operational Endpoints Guardrail
nodes.rationale: GET /healthz, GET /readyz, and GET /version must be preserved.

nodes.label: Domain Package Approval Rule
nodes.rationale: Domain packages should be added only when the corresponding feature plan is approved.

nodes.label: Behavior Tests Before Production Code
nodes.rationale: The plan requires failing behavior tests before adding new backend or frontend production behavior.

nodes.label: Admin Mutation and Read Only Access
nodes.norm_label: admin mutation and read only access

nodes.label: Archive Instead of Delete
nodes.rationale: Unit records should remain recoverable, so archiving replaces hard deletion and recursive archive hides the active subtree.

nodes.label: Lean Workspace Boundaries
nodes.rationale: The scaffold mirrors example technology and work methods while avoiding copied OCR, billing, authentication, and other product feature code.

nodes.label: Operational Endpoints Only
nodes.rationale: The initial backend exposes only liveness, readiness, and version endpoints.

nodes.label: Organization Units Later First Feature
nodes.rationale: Organization Units are intentionally left out of the scaffold so they can be added later as the first domain feature through a focused plan.
